title: 愛我的人和我愛的人
research_summary: 這首歌曲通過細膩的旋律和深沉的情感表達了愛情中的痛苦與無奈，呈現出一種憂鬱而哀傷的氛圍。
background_prompt: A dimly lit room with a single window showing rain falling softly outside, the interior illuminated only by warm candlelight on a wooden desk. A clock quietly ticking in the background.
outfit_prompt: The character is dressed in simple and comfortable clothing: a loose grey sweater over a white t-shirt, paired with dark blue jeans and brown loafers. The outfit conveys a sense of melancholy and introspection.
scene_description: MV的畫面呈現一個略顯昏暗的小房間，窗外細雨綿綿，一盞暖色調的檯燈投射出溫柔的光線照亮著房間角落。背景牆上掛著一幅單純的風景畫或是一張黑白照片，增添了一絲懷舊感。主角坐在書桌前，面前擺放著一本翻開的筆記本和一支鋼筆，眼神裡充滿了迷茫與哀愁。
